THERE IS REASONABLE NECESSITY, AS SUPPORTED BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE, FOR THE DEPT. OF CORRECTIONS FAMILY VISITING REGULATION.THE COURT GRANTS SUMMARY ADJUDICATION TO THE DEPT.ON THIS MATTER.BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S REMAINING PROCEDURAL CHALLENGES TO THE 1996 VERSION OF THE FAMILY-VISITING REGULATION CAN PROVIDE NO EFFECTIVE RELIEF, THIS CASE IS MOOT. THUS, THE COURT GRANTS SUMMARY JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT.
